summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of STARTON multi-page website with enhanced content. All 30+ test cases passed across all 5 pages (Home, Work, Services, Company, Careers). About page correctly removed, navigation updated, mobile menu working, all page content verified.

issues: 1200ms loading spinner appears on every direct URL page load. This is intentional but may feel slow for returning visitors.
Theme toggle button on mobile can be blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge in bottom right corner. This is an external badge overlay, not an app bug.

critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.jsx: Theme state is not persisted to localStorage - toggling dark mode is reset on page refresh (carried over from iteration 1)
PageLayout.jsx: generateParticles() is called on every render - consider memoizing with useMemo (carried over from iteration 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 pages tested: Home (/), Work (/work), Services (/services), Company (/company), Careers (/careers). About page (/about) correctly removed - shows blank page with 'No routes matched' console warning. Navigation has Work, Services (dropdown), Company (dropdown), Careers links. Mobile menu has Work, Services, Company, Careers, Start a Project. Footer Company column has About Us, Approach, Our Team, Careers links.

navigation_header.details: Work, Services (dropdown), Company (dropdown), Careers links present. About link correctly removed.

about_route_removed.details: /about route shows blank page with 'No routes matched' console warning. No About content rendered.

work_page.details: Hero (label + title), stats bar (42+/96%/$50M+/3x), featured case study, filter tabs (All/Branding/Web&UX/Strategy/Marketing), 7 project cards with results, testimonials section (3 cards)

work_filters.details: All 5 filter buttons work. Branding filter shows 2 cards, All filter shows 7 cards.

services_page.details: Hero, 6 service detail cards with icons/taglines/features/metrics, Why STARTON section (3 cards), 5-step process, engagement models section (3 cards) with CTA

company_page.details: Hero, mission statement, company stats bar (2019/42+/3/96%), approach steps (4), 6 values, 4 team members, timeline (6 milestones), CTA

careers_page.details: Hero, 3 culture cards, 6 perks cards, 4 open role cards with Apply buttons, bottom CTA

mobile_menu.details: Toggle works, X icon shows when open, menu has Work/Services/Company/Careers/Start a Project links, menu closes on navigation

footer_links.details: Company column has About Us, Approach, Our Team, Careers links. All links functional.

theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle works on desktop. Adds/removes dark-theme class on html element.

start_project_button.details: Header Start a Project button scrolls to contact section on home page.

company_dropdown.details: Dropdown has Approach (/company), Careers (/careers), Our Team (/company) items. All links correct.

services_dropdown.details: Dropdown shows 5 service items, all link to /services page.

apply_buttons.details: All 4 Apply buttons on Careers page visible and navigate to home contact section.

cta_buttons.details: Services CTA, Company CTA, Careers general CTA, Footer Start a Project all visible and functional.
